news.t: Trade the Titans: Direxion Debuts New Suite of Leveraged & Inverse ETFs

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Technology Top 5 Bear 2X ETF (TTXD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund is passively managed, providing -2x leveraged exposure to an equally-weighted index of the top 5 largest US companies in the information technology sector. TTXD was launched on Oct 1, 2025 and is issued by Direxion.
infoTable: S&P 500 Information Technology (Sector) Top 5 Equal Capped Index

data.title: Trade the Titans: Direxion Debuts New Suite of Leveraged & Inverse ETFs
data.text: New York, United States, Oct. 01, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Direxion, a leading provider of tactical ETFs, today announced the launch of the Direxion Titans Leveraged & Inverse ETFs, a new suite of fun...
